creator: tijl@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 248952
patch

It's gmake 4.4 being picky about things FreeBSD make puts into the MAKEFLAGS environment variable.  The solution is to run it with ${SETENVI} ${WRK_ENV}.  But I wonder where that -D flag is coming from.  Are you building the port with "make -DSOMETHING"?
